contracts.pathObjectRule: Learning paths are PATH records, not records.learning_modules[].meta.type.
contracts.notes: SSF /learn view. meta.title remains a string for compatibility; bilingual fields are under meta.i18n. MAT-2201/MAT-2202 are folded into MAT-2102/MAT-2103. KG-0006 resolved: snake_case legacy fields were replaced by camelCase runtime fields. KG-0012 resolved: learning_path removed as module type; use PATH objects.
